lines.speaker: Jyn
lines.text: Agh! You scared me! Now I've lost my lockpick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry about that. Do you want one of mine?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, sorry about that. I'm afraid I don't have one for you.

lines.speaker: Jyn
lines.text: Don't worry about it, I brought an extra just in case. Lockpicks really do help with disarming these traps.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, that's good to know, thanks for the tip! Out of curiosity, what outfit is that?

lines.speaker: Jyn
lines.text: It's called the Rogue's outfit. I got it from the Rogue's Den in Burthorpe. I've found it helps me blend in when pickpocketing people, allowing me to steal more coins from them.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It looks cool. Does it also help here?

lines.speaker: Jyn
lines.text: Ha ha ha, of course not! I don't think the coffin cares whether or not I blend in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Good point. Why are you wearing it though if it doesn't help you get more loot?

lines.speaker: Jyn
lines.text: Honestly, I just really like how it looks. You've got to look your best while travelling right?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Each to their own I suppose. I'll be off. Best of luck down here.

sections.title: When attempting to open a coffin

lines.speaker: Jyn
lines.text: Agh, thought I had it that time!
